title: Context and Providers
description: Contexts share data across the component tree without passing props through every level.
creating_context_intro: <0>createContext</0> creates a context with an optional default value. <1>useContext</1> reads the nearest provider's value.
nested_providers_intro: Inner providers override outer ones for their subtree:
tip_cross_cutting: Use contexts for cross-cutting concerns like AWS region, environment name, or shared credentials that many components need.
